_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for hr_payroll analysis tasks.

scaffolds.name: Identify Document Scope
steps: Locate document title/type and primary reference identifiers
Confirm issuer and recipient/traveler/student/employee/property context
Capture document period/date range boundaries
Map key sections likely to answer the user question
Return scoped extraction plan with citation anchors

scaffolds.name: Extract Core Fields
steps: Extract key entities from header and summary sections
Extract line-item or event details from tabular sections
Normalize dates, currency, and identifiers
Validate required field presence for the detected doc type
Present concise structured output with missing fields flagged

scaffolds.name: Reconcile Numeric and Date Logic
steps: Compute subtotal/tax/fee/credit/debit relationships where applicable
Check chronological consistency across all extracted dates
Validate status fields against computed balances or timelines
Record mismatches with exact source evidence
Return pass/fail checks with confidence and next checks

scaffolds.name: Evidence-Based Guidance
steps: Restate user goal and relevant constraints from the document
Identify decisions or actions supported by evidence
Highlight policy/terms that limit interpretation
List unresolved data gaps and required supporting docs
Provide neutral next steps without inventing policy
